Title: Neon Wash
Speaker: {operative.name}
Setting: Sublevel conference room, strip-LEDs cycling indigo to magenta, rain streaking the glass ceiling
TextLines: The projector throws mission telemetry across the far wall — thermal overlays, comm intercepts, satellite feeds — all of it rendered in {corp}'s proprietary cyan.
{operative.name} hasn't sat down yet. Still in field blacks, still smelling like ozone and cheap synth-rain from the {location} underpass.
"Debrief says clean. My hands say otherwise."
The after-action report blinks on your tablet. Three paragraphs of operational language that don't mention the guard who stopped breathing in the stairwell.
Outside, the arcology hums its sixty-hertz lullaby. Business as usual.

Choices.Label: "Clean is what the report says. That's what clean means here."
"Walk me through it. The parts that aren't in the file."
